description_long: This is a classic wooden barrel with a cylindrical shape, slightly bulging at the center and narrowing towards the top and bottom. The exterior is constructed from vertical wooden staves, held tightly together by three evenly spaced black metal hoops or bands. The wood has a natural, medium-brown finish with visible grain, giving it a rustic and sturdy appearance. The top and bottom surfaces are flat and made of the same wood, seamlessly integrated with the staves. There are no visible handles, spouts, or openings, and the surface is free from any labels or markings. This type of barrel is commonly used for storage or transport of liquids or dry goods in urban, industrial, or outdoor settings.
description: A medium-brown wooden barrel with black metal hoops, bulging at the center and flat on top and bottom, featuring a rustic, sturdy appearance.
description_view_0: The barrel is seen from the front, showing the full curvature, three black metal hoops, and a seamless wooden top.
description_view_1: This view reveals a small circular detail on the upper side, possibly a bung hole, with the rest of the features similar to the front.
description_view_2: The barrel's side is visible, with the wood grain and metal hoops prominent, and no additional features or markings.
description_view_3: Another side view, showing a small circular detail near the top, with the wood and metal bands clearly visible.
